lore.english:
Taimanin, student of Gosha Academy. She formerly served the Nisha family of the Fuuma clan, but now leads a group of independent troops on her own. 

Childhood friend of Fuuma Kotaro. Calls him 'Fuu-kun' and often uses him as a servant to carry her shopping bags. Fuuma finds it difficult to deal with both her and her sister.

Elec Art user. Her ninja art 'Display' materializes the digital information on a smartphone screen. In other words, she materializes and manipulates computer graphics. She can make a wolf that looks like a spotted cat attack, or a mouse that looks like a bear steal.

skills.name: [&Color_Orange][&EVD] Aura[-]
skills.description: Increase EVD of All allies by 12.5% in Extermination
skills.description_readable: Increase EVD of All allies by 12.5% in Extermination

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Ignore and Throw[-]
skills.description: Throws a shuriken at the enemy while answering the phone.
skills.description_readable: Throws a shuriken at the enemy while answering the phone.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Elec Art: Pixel Cat[-]
skills.description:
Summons an digitized animal from the smartphone and sends it to the enemy to detonate.
Inflicts [&Color_Cyan]([V3:730202]%)[-] [&EvdDown] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:730202]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:730202] turn(s)
Reduces the target's [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:730203]%)[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:730203]%[-] chance.
skills.description_readable:
Summons an digitized animal from the smartphone and sends it to the enemy to detonate.
Inflicts (-19.5%) EVD DOWN at a 95% chance.
Duration: 2 turn(s)
Reduces the target's Turn Gauge by (15%) at a 50% chance.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Elec Art: Display[-]
skills.description:
Summons a flock of electronic animals and charges them toward the enemy.
Inflicts [&ActiveSkillBlock] to the target at a [&Color_Cyan][R:730302]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:730302] turn(s)
When defeating an enemy with this skill, [&Common_Word_Skill_CoolTime] of [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_7302] is reset.
skills.description_readable:
Summons a flock of electronic animals and charges them toward the enemy.
Inflicts Active Skill Disable to the target at a 10% chance.
Duration: 2 turn(s)
When defeating an enemy with this skill, Cooldown of Elec Art: Pixel Cat is reset.

skill_data.name: <[&Tbl_UnitWeapon_Name_7301]> [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_7303]
skill_data.description:
Summons a flock of electronic animals and charges them toward the enemy.
Inflicts [&ActiveSkillBlock] to the target at a [&Color_Cyan][R:730302]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:730302] turn(s)
When defeating an enemy with this skill, reduces [&Common_Word_Skill_CoolTime] of 2nd skill of [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll] by [V2:731303] turn(s).
skill_data.description_readable:
Summons a flock of electronic animals and charges them toward the enemy.
Inflicts Active Skill Disable to the target at a 10% chance.
Duration: 2 turn(s)
When defeating an enemy with this skill, reduces Cooldown of 2nd skill of ALL allies by -1 turn(s).
